build.command: cargo build --manifest-path /workspace/warpctrl-validation/drive-auth-execution/Cargo.toml -p warp --bin warp-oss --bin warpctrl --features warp_control_cli

gui_environment.screenshot_strategy: single staggered composition: xterm running warpctrl at upper-left and target Warp GUI visible behind/right when feasible
notes: No real API key values were printed or captured. Fake placeholders were used for API-key/proof denial evidence.
Warp OSS opened to first-run onboarding; this still provided a real graphical Warp app target and discovery/control server for denial validation.

commands.command_string: WARPCTRL_TERMINAL_PROOF_ID=fake-proof WARPCTRL_TERMINAL_SESSION_ID=fake-session WARPCTRL_TERMINAL_PROOF_SECRET=<redacted-placeholder> $WARPCTRL --output-format json drive list --type workflow
commands.expected_result: fake inside-Warp proof env without app-injected endpoint must be rejected with execution_context_not_allowed.

error.message: inside-Warp credentials require an app-injected local-control endpoint

commands.command_string: WARPCTRL_TERMINAL_PROOF_ID=fake-proof WARPCTRL_TERMINAL_SESSION_ID=fake-session WARPCTRL_TERMINAL_PROOF_SECRET=<redacted-placeholder> $WARPCTRL --output-format json input run "printf warpctrl-validation"
commands.expected_result: fake inside-Warp proof env without app-injected endpoint must be rejected with execution_context_not_allowed.

error.message: inside-Warp credentials require an app-injected local-control endpoint

commands.expected_result: Success path may only be run with safe app-issued verified Warp-terminal proof, logged-in authenticated user, and disposable Drive/session resources.
commands.skip_or_blocker_reason: No app-issued verified Warp-terminal proof or disposable Drive object/workflow IDs were available in this remote validation environment. Outside-Warp and fake-proof/API-key denial paths were captured instead; no real secrets were exposed.
